name: logistics carriers managing 5–15 vehicles tool
description: For logistics carriers managing 5–15 vehicles, fuel usage anomalies cause unexpected costs. We provide real-time tracking instead of manual tracking and reporting of fuel usage.

features: manual entry of fuel usage data
